items.title: Belgium detains three suspected Cameroon separatists in war crimes probe
items.dek: Money is reportedly being raised by them for the armed struggle, prosecutors say.

items.title: Guilty verdict for US father of teenage school shooter
items.dek: Prosecutors say Colin Gray, 55, could have prevented his son from killing four people at a high school in Georgia in 2024.
items.body: Prosecutors say Colin Gray, 55, could have prevented his son from killing four people at a high school in Georgia in 2024.
